since_last: 67% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.14%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -2.32% · Gold -1.86% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 67% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.14%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.14%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.39%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at +9.37%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +9.37%, MRVL +6.06%, LRCX +5.51%, TER +5.09%, AMAT +5.07%. Laggards: IBM -3.59%, SPCX -2.74%, SNOW -1.20%, INTU -1.11%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.74% at $186.56
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.74% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
